title: On A Clean Book - To F. N.
content:
Like sea-washed sand upon the shore,
    So fine and clean the tale,
    So clear and bright I almost see,
    The flashing of a sail.

    The tang of salt is in its veins,
    The freshness of the spray
    God give you love and lore and strength,
    To give us such alway.
meaning:
Paul Laurence Dunbar's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On A Clean Book - To F. N."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
